description: Hugging Face dataset IDs, configs, URLs, commit hashes, and license attribution for all paper-cited eval data. All seven entries are pinned end-to-end across the canonical paper-result CUDA producer scripts that generated the committed result JSONs: those scripts read this manifest and pass the recorded `commit` via the `revision=` argument to `load_dataset`. `tests/test_script_preflight.py` enforces this for the `SCRIPTS_REQUIRING_PREFLIGHT` list (paper-result producers). Local-dev MPS scripts and from-scratch trainer scripts are intentionally exempt from preflight and are not covered by the pinning test. Per-dataset `license` mirrors DATA.md.

Salesforce/wikitext.notes: Hugging Face card declares dual license: cc-by-sa-3.0 and GFDL (https://www.gnu.org/licenses/fdl-1.3.html), reflecting Wikipedia's source-content licensing prior to its June 2023 migration to CC BY-SA 4.0. WikiText-103 (Merity et al. 2016) was scraped before that migration, so the source content is governed by CC BY-SA 3.0 + GFDL.

Skylion007/openwebtext.notes: Legacy `openwebtext` id is a Hugging Face redirect to this canonical id; both resolve to the same SHA. Producer scripts pass revision= via this manifest.

code_search_net.notes: Hugging Face card declares license: other. The MIT license at the license_url covers the upstream CodeSearchNet curation tool (https://github.com/github/CodeSearchNet); the constituent function bodies are scraped from many GitHub repositories with heterogeneous original licenses (predominantly MIT, Apache 2.0, BSD, with smaller fractions of other licenses). Loaded with trust_remote_code=True; revision pinning covers the upstream loader script as well as the data.
